title: Improved Minecraft Phase
description: Spice up your next 2 week minecraft phase with your friends!
body:
# Spice up your next 2 week minecraft phase.

This modpack contains lots of improvements to various areas of minecraft, improving the progression, items, nether, end, structures, and more.

It is made in collaboration with my friends who all added one or two mods of their choosing to the pack (this is why there are some seemingly random mods like camerapture, these will likely be removed or replaced with v2.0.0, which will change lots of existing mods aswell as adding more).

The modpack is designed to make your minecraft server last longer and not end after one person speedruns the game. There are multiple mods that add late game tasks and gear better than netherite. It works best if you don't know what all the mods do going in (however JEI helps you understand what there is and how to get it).

For the moment it only supports 1.20.1 however 1.21 support is in the works and will likely be released with v2.0.0

![End fight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9e09f6f804c5245177ac84f2ac8fe2b39c5d215.png)

## Features
Features various of the classics such as all of Yung's structures, TreeChop, and BetterNether + BetterEnd.
It also features lots of quality of life mods and performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Iris, Distant Horizons, JEI, AppleSkin, and more.

There are things for everyone, you can live out your engineering dreams with Create, explore the worlds and build new things with Teralith, or dive into the unknown with BetterNether, BetterEnd, and Deeper and Darker.


## Disclaimer about beta versions
This modpack was originally intended as a private thing just for a minecraft server with my friends, and i would share the file in a discord server. This means that the beta versions are uploaded for documentation and archiving purposes, and the patch notes are just what i wrote on the patch notes in the discord server.

v0.1 isn't available because i didn't realise you had to export as a mrpack file and exported it as a zip.

I highly discourage downloading these beta versions as they are incomplete and were only made for testing.
